transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Did you reserve a booth in the language lab for tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. They're usually full in the afternoon, so I made the reservation early.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the man make the reservation early?

questions.prompt: Why did the man make the reservation early?

choices.text: He wanted to make sure a booth was available.
His professor required an early reservation.
He forgot to reserve one yesterday.

questions.explanation: He reserved early because the booths are usually full in the afternoon.
questions.evidence: They're usually full in the afternoon, so I made the reservation early.
